---
title: Bayesian statistics for ecology
about:
  template: marquee
  image: assets/sbl_frog.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: github
---




## Descent with modification

Much of this material was developed for the University of Sherbrooke course [Advanced Statistics and hierarchical models](), which was written and delivered by Guillaume Blanchet and Andrew MacDonald

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![[Dr Guillaume 
Blanchet](https://www.usherbrooke.ca/biologie/nous-joindre/personnel/corps-professoral/ecologie-terrestre/guillaume-blanchet)](https://www.usherbrooke.ca/biologie/fileadmin/sites/biologie/images/Personnel/Blanchet_Guillaume_resize.jpg)

![[Dr Andrew MacDonald](aammd.github.io)](https://aammd.github.io/for_website.png)
:::
